
```{ojs}
makeIsotype = function({ inputData }) {

  const chartIsotypeMain = vl.markPoint({
      size: 0.5,
      stroke: "black",
      strokeWidth: 0,
      strokeOpacity: 1,
      opacity: 0.8,
    })
    .transform(
      vl.calculate("sequence(0, datum.percRound)").as("positions"),
      vl.flatten(["positions"]),
      vl.calculate("datum.positions % 10").as("positionX"),
      vl.calculate("floor(datum.positions / 10)").as("positionY"),
    )
    .encode(
      vl.y().fieldN("gesl").axis(null),
      vl.yOffset()
        .fieldQ("positionY")
        .scale({
          domain: [0, 5],
        }),
      vl.x()
        .fieldQ("positionX")
        .axis({
          title: null,
          labels: false,
          ticks: false,
          domain: false,
          grid: false,
        })
        .scale({
          domain: [0, 10],
        }),
      vl.fill()
        .fieldN("gesl")
        .scale({
          range: colors2,
        })
        .legend(false),
      vl.shape()
        .fieldN("gesl")
        .scale({
          range: [
            path2,
            path1,
            ]
        })
        .legend(false)
    )

  // const chartIsotypeText = vl.markText({
  //     fontSize: 14,
  //     dx: 24,
  //     dy: 31,
  //     align: "left",
  //   })
  //   .transform(
  //     vl.filter(select),
  //     vl.window([{ op: "rank", as: "rank" }]).groupby(["indicator"]),
  //     vl.filter("datum.rank == 1"),
  //     vl.calculate("datum['pot_pzt']/2").as("positions"),
  //   )
  //   .encode(
  //     vl.y().fieldN("indicator").axis(null),
  //     vl.text().fieldN("indicator"),
  //     vl.x().fieldQ("positions"),
  //   )

  return vl.layer(
    chartIsotypeMain,
    // chartIsotypeText,
  )
  .width(makeWidth(width) / 2)
  .height(300)
  .facet({
    field: "tail",
    type: "nominal",
    title: null,
    sort: ["lower", "higher"],
    scale: {
      domain: ["lower", "higher"],
      range: ["lower", "higher"],
    },
    header: {
      labelFontSize: 0,
      labelOrient: "top",
      labelExpr: "datum.value == 'lower' ? 'weniger' : 'mehr'",
      labelPadding: 0,
    },
  })
  .resolve({scale: {x: "independent", yOffset: "independent"}})
  .data(inputData)
  .config(config);

}
```
